---
title: "CrC_analysis"
author: "Humam Siga"
output: html_document
chunk_output_type: inline #or console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

rm(list=ls())
library(maftools)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyr)
library(VennDiagram)
library(GenVisR)
library(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene)
library(BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)
library(biomaRt)
library(png)
library(data.table)
library(ggpmisc)
library(zoo)

```

########################
##   Loading files   ##
########################

#select the file and the wanted regions
```{r loading Data}
setwd("/PATH/to/working/directory/")

input_path = "/PATH/to/maffile/"

input_maf = paste0(input_path, "Both.onlyPASS_labled.maf")

noigr = c("Frame_Shift_Del", "Frame_Shift_Ins", "Splice_Site", "Translation_Start_Site",
                "Nonsense_Mutation","Nonstop_Mutation","In_Frame_Del","In_Frame_Ins","Missense_Mutation",
                "Intron", "3'Flank", "RNA", "5'Flank",  "3'UTR", "Silent", "5'UTR", "Splice_Region") #"IGR"

everyregion = c(noigr, "IGR")

```


#loading maf
```{r}
crc_everything = read.maf(maf = input_maf, vc_nonSyn = everyregion)
crc_noigr = read.maf(maf = input_maf, vc_nonSyn = everyregion)

```


```{r}
#test
#subsetMaf(crc_everything, genes = "APC")@data
```

##################################
##   General data exploratory   ##
##################################

```{r,}
#shows clinical data associated with samples
getClinicalData(crc_noigr)
#Shows all fields in MAF
getFields(crc_noigr)
#Shows sample summary.
getSampleSummary(crc_everything)
getSampleSummary(crc_noigr)
#get variant summary per sample
crc_everything@variant.type.summary
crc_noigr@variant.type.summary
#Shows gene summary.
head(getGeneSummary(crc_noigr))
```


#Split the samples
```{r}
#everything
crc_eve_p18 <- filterMaf(crc_everything, tsb = "tumor_19") #opposite
crc_eve_p19 <- filterMaf(crc_everything, tsb = "tumor_18")

# #no igr
# crc_noigr_p18 <- filterMaf(crc_noigr, tsb = "tumor_19") #opposite
# crc_noigr_p19 <- filterMaf(crc_noigr, tsb = "tumor_18")


maftools::plotmafSummary(crc_eve_p18)
maftools::plotmafSummary(crc_eve_p19)


#adjust color
names(getSampleSummary(crc_everything))

col = c(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12,name = "Paired"),
      RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(11,name = "Spectral")[1:3],'black', 'violet', 'royalblue', 'darkgreen')

names(col) = names(getSampleSummary(crc_everything))

#Plot mutated genes
names(col) = names(getSampleSummary(crc_noigr))
col = col[1:(length(col) - 1)]

#Plot stats
plotmafSummary(maf = crc_eve_p18 , rmOutlier = TRUE, addStat = 'median', dashboard = TRUE, titvRaw = FALSE, color = col, showBarcodes = T)
plotmafSummary(maf = crc_eve_p19 , rmOutlier = TRUE, addStat = 'median', dashboard = TRUE, titvRaw = FALSE, color = col, showBarcodes = T)


#Plot types in chromosomes  
rainfallPlot(crc_eve_p18, ref.build = "hg38")
rainfallPlot(crc_eve_p19, ref.build = "hg38")

#Optional
# rainfallPlot(crc_eve_p18, ref.build = "hg38", detectChangePoints = T)
# rainfallPlot(crc_eve_p19, ref.build = "hg38", detectChangePoints = T)

```


#Plot the numbers of mutations
```{r}

variants_counts <- rbind(crc_eve_p18@variant.type.summary, crc_eve_p19@variant.type.summary)

setnames(variants_counts,old = "SNP", "SNV")
setnames(variants_counts,old = "DNP", "DNV")
setnames(variants_counts,old = "TNP", "TNV")
setnames(variants_counts,old = "ONP", "ONV")

variants_counts <- variants_counts[,-"total"]

variants_counts$Tumor_Sample_Barcode <- c("P18","P19")
variants_counts <- variants_counts %>% pivot_longer(cols = colnames(variants_counts[,-1]))

#variants_counts <- data.frame(variants_counts, row.names = "Tumor_Sample_Barcode")
#log(variants_counts, base = 10)

p <-ggplot2::ggplot(data=variants_counts, aes(x=factor(name, levels = c("Total","INS","DEL","ONV","TNV","DNV","SNV") ), y=log(value,base = 10), fill=Tumor_Sample_Barcode)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge()) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("orange", "lightseagreen")) +
  labs(fill = "sample", y= "Log10 number of variants", x="Types of variants") +
  theme_minimal()

p
```


```{r}

p <- ggplot(
  data = variants_counts, 
  aes(
    x = factor(name, levels = c("Total","INS","DEL","ONV","TNV","DNV","SNV")), 
    y = log10(value), 
    fill = Tumor_Sample_Barcode
  )
) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  
  # Refined color palette (clean, modern)
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#3B82F6","#E11D48")) +
  
  labs(
    fill = "Sample",
    x = "Variant Type",
    y = expression(Log[10]~"Variant Count"),
   # title = "Variant Counts Across Samples",
   # subtitle = "Log10-transformed values for improved visualization"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, color = "gray30"),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

p
```


#save_plot
```{r}
ggsave(plot = p, filename = "new_fig4_A.svg", width = 1500, height = 1600,
       limitsize = F, units = "px")

```


#Plot the type of mutations
```{r}
#plot titv
crc_everything.titv = titv(maf = crc_everything, plot = FALSE, useSyn = TRUE)
crc_everything.titv$fraction.contribution

#plot titv summary
fraction_plot <- crc_everything.titv$fraction.contribution
fraction_plot$Tumor_Sample_Barcode <- c("P18","P19")
fraction_plot <- fraction_plot %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = colnames( crc_everything.titv$fraction.contribution[,-1]))

#order as in P18
order_series <-  fraction_plot %>% filter(Tumor_Sample_Barcode=="P18") %>% 
                    dplyr::arrange(value) %>% dplyr::select(name)


p <- ggplot2::ggplot(data=fraction_plot, aes(x=factor(name, levels =  order_series$name ), y = value,  fill=Tumor_Sample_Barcode)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge()) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("orange", "lightseagreen")) +
  labs(fill = "sample", x= "SNV class", y="% of SNV") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal()

p


```

#new_and_save_plot
```{r}
p <- ggplot(
  data = fraction_plot,
  aes(
    x = factor(name, levels = order_series$name),
    y = value,
    fill = Tumor_Sample_Barcode
  )
) +
  geom_bar(
    stat = "identity",
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    width = 0.7
  ) +
  coord_flip() +

  # More refined and modern colors
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#3B82F6","#E11D48")) +

  labs(
    fill = "Sample",
    x = "SNV Class",
    y = "% of SNVs",
    #title = "Fraction of SNV Classes per Sample"
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

p
ggsave(plot = p, filename = "new_fig4_B.svg", width = 1500, height = 1600,
        limitsize = F, units = "px")

```


########################
##   Pathways ploths  ##
########################

```{r}
#top mutated
oncoplot(maf = crc_everything, top = 20, colors = col)

# Plot Pathways every
pws = pathways(maf = crc_everything, plotType = "bar")
pws18 = pathways(maf = crc_eve_p18, plotType = "bar")
pws19 = pathways(maf = crc_eve_p19, plotType = "bar")

maftools:::get_pw_summary(maf = crc_eve_p19  )

pathways_names = pws[,c(1,2)]
pws18 <- merge(pathways_names, pws18[,-"N"], by="Pathway", all=T)
pws19 <- merge(pathways_names, pws19[,-"N"], by="Pathway", all=T)

pws18[is.na(pws18)] <- 0
pws19[is.na(pws19)] <- 0

#oncoplot(maf = crc_eve_p18, pathways = "sigpw", selectedPathways = "WNT")
#oncoplot(maf = crc_eve_p19, pathways = "sigpw", selectedPathways = "WNT")

# # Adjust to pathway plotting
# genescol = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(n = 8, name = 'Paired')
# genescol = rep("darkred", 8)
# 
# oncoplot(maf = crc_everything, pathways = "sigpw", selectedPathways = "RTK-RAS",  
#          drawColBar = F, drawRowBar = F, removeNonMutated = F, showPct=F,
#          colors = genescol, fill=T, showTumorSampleBarcodes=T,
#          sampleOrder=c("tumor_18","tumor_19"))#,titleText = "RTK-RAS Pathway")

#To plot both with the same order
plot_bar_pathways <- function (maf, altered_pws , plotType = "bar",
                               panelWidths = c(2, 4, 4), col = "#f39c12", pathdb = "sigpw", fontSize = 1 )
  {
            altered_pws <- altered_pws[order(altered_pws$Pathway)]
            nsamps = as.numeric(maf@summary[ID == "Samples", 
                summary])
            lo = layout(mat = matrix(c(1, 2, 3), ncol = 3, nrow = 1), 
                widths = panelWidths)
            par(mar = c(2, 2, 2, 0))
            plot(NA, xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, nrow(altered_pws)), 
                axes = FALSE)
            text(x = 1, y = seq(0.5, nrow(altered_pws), by = 1), 
                labels = altered_pws$Pathway, adj = 1, xpd = TRUE, 
                cex = fontSize)
            title(main = "Pathway", adj = 0)
            par(mar = c(2, 0, 2, 1), xpd = TRUE)
            plot(NA, xlim = c(0, 1.2), ylim = c(0, nrow(altered_pws)), 
                axes = FALSE)
            rect(xleft = 0, ybottom = seq(0.1, nrow(altered_pws), 
                by = 1), xright = 1, ytop = seq(0.2, nrow(altered_pws), 
                by = 1) + 0.7, col = "#ecf0f1", border = "white")
            rect(xleft = 0, ybottom = seq(0.1, nrow(altered_pws), 
                by = 1), xright = altered_pws$fraction_affected, 
                ytop = seq(0.2, nrow(altered_pws), by = 1) + 
                  0.7, col = col, border = "white")
            text(x = 1.05, y = seq(0.5, nrow(altered_pws), by = 1), 
                labels = paste0(altered_pws$n_affected_genes, 
                  "/", altered_pws$N), adj = 0, cex = fontSize)
            axis(side = 1, at = seq(0, 1, 0.25), line = -1, cex.axis = fontSize)
            title(main = "Fraction of pathway affected", adj = 0)
            # par(mar = c(2, 0, 2, 1), xpd = TRUE)
            # plot(NA, xlim = c(0, 1.2), ylim = c(0, nrow(altered_pws)), 
            #     axes = FALSE)
            # rect(xleft = 0, ybottom = seq(0.1, nrow(altered_pws), 
            #     by = 1), xright = 1, ytop = seq(0.2, nrow(altered_pws), 
            #     by = 1) + 0.7, col = "#ecf0f1", border = "white")
            # rect(xleft = 0, ybottom = seq(0.1, nrow(altered_pws), 
            #     by = 1), xright = altered_pws$Fraction_mutated_samples, 
            #     ytop = seq(0.2, nrow(altered_pws), by = 1) + 
            #       0.7, col = col, border = "white")
            # text(x = 1.05, y = seq(0.5, nrow(altered_pws), by = 1), 
            #     labels = paste0(altered_pws$Mutated_samples, 
            #       "/", nsamps), adj = 0, cex = fontSize)
            # axis(side = 1, at = seq(0, 1, 0.25), line = -1, cex.axis = fontSize)
            # title(main = "Fraction of samples affected")
        }
plot_bar_pathways(maf = crc_eve_p18, altered_pws =  pws18)

plot_bar_pathways(maf = crc_eve_p19, altered_pws =  pws19)
```


#Final plot pathways, in both patients together
```{r}
pws18$sample <- "P18"
pws19$sample <- "P19"

pws_both <- rbind(pws18, pws19)

pws_both <- pws_both %>% pivot_longer(cols = colnames(pws_both[,4]))

p <-ggplot2::ggplot(data=pws_both, aes(x=paste0(Pathway," (",N,")"), y=value, fill=sample)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(), width = 0.9) +
  coord_flip() +
  geom_text(aes(label=replace(n_affected_genes, n_affected_genes == 0 , "")),hjust = 1.3, position=position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("orange", "lightseagreen")) +
  labs(fill = "sample", y= "Fraction of the pathway affected", x= "Pathway (number of genes)") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, .1), limits = c(0,0.7)) +
  theme_minimal() #+
 # theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 2)) 
p

# ggsave(plot = p, filename = "fig4_B.svg", width = 2500, height = 2000, limitsize = F,
#       units = "px")

```

#Modified plot

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

pws_both2 <- pws_both %>%
  mutate(Pathway_lbl = paste0(Pathway, " (", N, ")"))

pws_both_complete <- pws_both2 %>%
  complete(
    Pathway_lbl,
    sample,
    fill = list(value = 0, n_affected_genes = 0)
  )


#plotting
p <- ggplot(
  data = pws_both_complete,
  aes(
    x = factor(Pathway_lbl),
    y = value,
    fill = sample
  )
) +
  geom_bar(
    stat = "identity",
    width = 0.7,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8, preserve="single")
  ) +
  coord_flip() +

  # Label n_affected_genes but hide zeros
  geom_text(
    aes(
      label = ifelse(n_affected_genes == 0, "", n_affected_genes)
    ),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    hjust = -0.2,
    size = 3.2,
    color = "black"
  ) +

  # Modern colors (matching your earlier plots)
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("P18" = "#3B82F6", "P19" = "#E11D48")) +

  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1),
    limits = c(0, 0.7),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +

  labs(
    fill = "Sample",
    x = "Pathway (number of genes)",
    y = "Fraction of pathway affected",
   # title = "Pathway Alteration Comparison",
   # subtitle = "Fraction of altered genes per pathway in P18 vs P19"
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, color = "gray30"),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

p

ggsave(plot = p, filename = "new_fig4_C.svg", width = 2500, height = 2000, limitsize = F,
      units = "px")
```



```{r}
# Here to extract genes from pathways
# pathway name	Gene	no_mut_p18	no_mut_p19
# KRAS			
# 	gene1	4	3
# 	gene2	2	5
# TP53			
# 	gene1	5	4
# 	gene2	2	2


pw18 <- maftools:::get_pw_summary(maf = crc_eve_p18, pathways = "sigpw")
pw19 <- maftools:::get_pw_summary(maf = crc_eve_p19, pathways = "sigpw")

genes_list <- attr(pw18, "genes")  # same for P18 and P19


count_mutations <- function(maf, gene_list) {
  maf_genes <- maf@data %>% dplyr::count(Hugo_Symbol, name = "mut_count")
  maf_genes <- as.data.frame(maf_genes)

  # Keep only genes in this pathway
  maf_genes <- maf_genes %>% 
    dplyr::filter(Hugo_Symbol %in% gene_list)

  # Return named vector: Gene → count
  counts <- setNames(maf_genes$mut_count, maf_genes$Hugo_Symbol)

  return(counts)
}
  
results <- list()

for (pw in names(genes_list)) {
    genes <- genes_list[[pw]]

    # Count mutations in each sample
    c18 <- count_mutations(crc_eve_p18, genes)
    c19 <- count_mutations(crc_eve_p19, genes)

    # Put into a table
    df <- data.frame(
        Pathway = pw,
        Gene = genes,
        no_mut_P18 = c18[genes],
        no_mut_P19 = c19[genes],
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    # Replace NA with 0
    df[is.na(df)] <- 0

    results[[pw]] <- df
}

final_table <- do.call(rbind, results)
final_table <- final_table %>% filter(no_mut_P18 + no_mut_P19 > 0)

final_table

```


##################################
##   Haplotypes analysis   ##
##################################


```{R}
# #High score#
crc_eve_hs_p18 <- subsetMaf(crc_eve_p18, query = "HPST>=30")
crc_eve_hs_p19 <- subsetMaf(crc_eve_p19, query = "HPST>=30")

# #percentage of high-score phased variants
crc_eve_hs_p18@variant.type.summary$total / crc_eve_p18@variant.type.summary$total
crc_eve_hs_p19@variant.type.summary$total / crc_eve_p19@variant.type.summary$total

# rainfallPlot(crc_eve_hs_p18, ref.build = "hg38")
# rainfallPlot(crc_eve_hs_p19, ref.build = "hg38")

```



```{r}
#function to add HP numbere based on t_HPA number

add_HP_to_maf <- function(maf, min_HPST=30) {

#  maf <- subsetMaf(maf, query = paste0("HPST>=", min_HPST))
  
      #function for the allele counts per mutation
    commas_to_cols <- function(df, wanted_col = "t_HPA") {
      wanted = data.frame(base::do.call(rbind, strsplit(df$t_HPA, ",")))
      wanted = apply(wanted, 2, function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))
      return(wanted)
    }
  
  #making empty column
  maf@data$HP = 0
  maf@maf.silent <- cbind(maf@maf.silent, data.table(HP=NA))
  
  hp1_line  <- ((commas_to_cols(maf@data, 't_HPA')[,2] - commas_to_cols(maf@data, 't_HPA')[,1]) <  0) & (maf@data$HPST >= min_HPST)
  hp2_line  <- ((commas_to_cols(maf@data, 't_HPA')[,2] - commas_to_cols(maf@data, 't_HPA')[,1]) >  0) & (maf@data$HPST >= min_HPST)
  
  maf@data$HP[hp1_line] = "1"
  maf@data$HP[hp2_line] = "2"
  
  return(maf)
    
}

crc_hs_p18 = add_HP_to_maf(crc_eve_hs_p18)
crc_hs_p18_hp1 <- subsetMaf(crc_hs_p18, query = "HP==1")
crc_hs_p18_hp2 <- subsetMaf(crc_hs_p18, query = "HP==2")

# rainfallPlot(crc_hs_p18_hp1, ref.build = "hg38", detectChangePoints = T)
# rainfallPlot(crc_hs_p18_hp2, ref.build = "hg38", detectChangePoints = T)
# rainfallPlot(crc_hs_p18, ref.build = "hg38", detectChangePoints = T)


crc_hs_p19 = add_HP_to_maf(crc_eve_hs_p19)
crc_hs_p19_hp1 <- subsetMaf(crc_hs_p19, query = "HP==1")
crc_hs_p19_hp2 <- subsetMaf(crc_hs_p19, query = "HP==2")
# rainfallPlot(crc_hs_p19_hp1, ref.build = "hg38", detectChangePoints = T)
# rainfallPlot(crc_hs_p19_hp2, ref.build = "hg38", detectChangePoints = T)
# rainfallPlot(crc_hs_p19, ref.build = "hg38", detectChangePoints = T)

#Save the maf data
# maftools::write.mafSummary(crc_hs_p18_hp1,"saved_mafs/crc_hs_p18_hp1")
# maftools::write.mafSummary(crc_hs_p18_hp2,"saved_mafs/crc_hs_p18_hp2")
# maftools::write.mafSummary(crc_hs_p19_hp1,"saved_mafs/crc_hs_p19_hp1")
# maftools::write.mafSummary(crc_hs_p19_hp2,"saved_mafs/crc_hs_p19_hp2")
```


```{r}
# Here to extract 
# pathway name	Gene	P18_no_mutation (HP1,2)*	P19_no_mutation (HP1,2)
# KRAS			
# 	gene1	4 (3,1)	1 (1,0)
# 	gene2	3 (2,1)	4 (1,2)
# TP53			
# 	gene1	4 (3,1)	4 (2,2)
# 	gene2	3 (2,1)	5 (3,1)

maf18 <- add_HP_to_maf(crc_eve_p18)
maf19 <- add_HP_to_maf(crc_eve_p19)

pw18 <- maftools:::get_pw_summary(maf18, pathways="sigpw")
genes_list <- attr(pw18, "genes")

count_hp_mutations <- function(maf, gene_list) {
  
  df <- maf@data %>% 
    dplyr::filter(Hugo_Symbol %in% gene_list)
  
  # Total mutation count
  total <- df %>%
    dplyr::count(Hugo_Symbol, name="total") %>%
    tibble::column_to_rownames("Hugo_Symbol")
  
  # HP1 mutation count
  hp1 <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(HP == "1") %>%
    dplyr::count(Hugo_Symbol, name="hp1") %>%
    tibble::column_to_rownames("Hugo_Symbol")
  
  # HP2 mutation count
  hp2 <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(HP == "2") %>%
    dplyr::count(Hugo_Symbol, name="hp2") %>%
    tibble::column_to_rownames("Hugo_Symbol")
  
  # combine
  all_genes <- gene_list
  
  result <- data.frame(
    Gene = all_genes,
    total = total[all_genes, "total"],
    hp1   = hp1[all_genes, "hp1"],
    hp2   = hp2[all_genes, "hp2"],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  result[is.na(result)] <- 0
  return(result)
}


all_results <- list()

for (pw in names(genes_list)) {
    genes <- genes_list[[pw]]
    
    # counts for P18
    c18 <- count_hp_mutations(maf18, genes)
    
    # counts for P19
    c19 <- count_hp_mutations(maf19, genes)
    
    # merge side-by-side
    df <- data.frame(
        Pathway = pw,
        Gene = genes,
        P18_no_mut = c18$total,
        P18_HP1 = c18$hp1,
        P18_HP2 = c18$hp2,
        P19_no_mut = c19$total,
        P19_HP1 = c19$hp1,
        P19_HP2 = c19$hp2,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    all_results[[pw]] <- df
}

final_table <- do.call(rbind, all_results)


#reformat
final_table$P18_formatted <- sprintf("%d (%d,%d)", 
                                     final_table$P18_no_mut,
                                     final_table$P18_HP1,
                                     final_table$P18_HP2)

final_table$P19_formatted <- sprintf("%d (%d,%d)", 
                                     final_table$P19_no_mut,
                                     final_table$P19_HP1,
                                     final_table$P19_HP2)

final_table <- final_table %>% filter(P18_no_mut + P19_no_mut > 0) %>% 
                          dplyr::select(c(Pathway, Gene,P18_formatted, P19_formatted))

write.csv(final_table , row.names = F, file = "pathway_hp_genes.csv")
```

```{r}

final_table_counts <- do.call(rbind, all_results)



final_table_counts <- final_table_counts %>% filter(P18_no_mut + P19_no_mut > 0) %>% 
                          dplyr::select(c(Pathway, Gene,P18_no_mut, P19_no_mut)) %>%
                          arrange(desc(Pathway))
write.csv(final_table_counts , row.names = F, file = "pathway_counts_genes.csv")


```


#Check consecutive mutations on the same allele (HMR analysis)

# MY function 3, with merging windows no rolling
```{r}
mutation_dens <- function (maf, mut_window = 5, average_distance = 1000,
                           merge_overlapped_windows = T) {
  
 # tt <- maf@data %>% filter (Variant_Type=="SNP") %>% 
  tt <- maf@data %>% 
    dplyr::select(c(Chromosome, Start_Position, End_Position))
  
  tiling <- split(tt, tt$Chromosome)


average_nMut_per_bp <- function(tiling, nMut = mut_window) {
      #take the starting position 
      tiling <- tiling  %>% dplyr::select(c(Chromosome, Start_Position, End_Position))
      newends <- tiling$End_Position
      #remove n-1 ends from the newend list
      newends <- newends[-(1:nMut-1)]
      #make the vector same length and fill NA last n-1
      length(newends) <- length(tiling$Start_Position)
      tiling$newend <- newends+1
      tiling$width <- newends-tiling$Start_Position 
      tiling$average_mut_per_window <- tiling$width/nMut
      return(tiling)
    }

#count windows 
kloci = lapply(tiling, average_nMut_per_bp)

#merge chrs
kloci = data.table::rbindlist(l = kloci, fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)


if(nrow(kloci)==0){
  print("Not hits found")
  return(0)
}

#order
chr_order <- paste0("chr", c((1:22),"X","Y"))
kloci$Chromosome <- factor(kloci$Chromosome, levels=chr_order)
kloci <- kloci[order(kloci$Chromosome),]
kloci <- kloci[,-"End_Position"]

#filter lengths
kloci <- kloci %>% filter(average_mut_per_window <= average_distance)

if (merge_overlapped_windows) {
 
  kloci <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(kloci, seqnames.field = "Chromosome",
                         start.field = "Start_Position",
                         end.field = "newend",
                         keep.extra.columns = F)
  kloci = GenomicRanges::reduce(kloci)

  tt <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(tt, seqnames.field = "Chromosome",
                           start.field = "Start_Position",
                           end.field = "End_Position",
                           keep.extra.columns = T) 
  
  #calculate the number of overlapping mutations
  kloci$num_of_mutations <- countOverlaps(kloci,tt)
  kloci$average_mut_per_window <-  BiocGenerics::width(kloci) / kloci$num_of_mutations 

return(data.frame(kloci))
} else {
  return(kloci)
}

}


```


# original kataegis function
```{r}
# 
# detect_kataegis_chr <- function (chr.dat, num_of_mut=6, avg_mut_dis=1000)
# {
#   print(paste0("new func numM=",num_of_mut, "avg_mut_dis=",avg_mut_dis))
#   chr.dat[, `:=`(row_idx, 1:nrow(chr.dat))]
#   start_idx = 1
#   end_idx = num_of_mut
#   queue = chr.dat[start_idx:end_idx]
#   kat_loc = data.table::data.table()
#   kat_id = 1
#   while (end_idx <= nrow(chr.dat)) {
#     if (mean(diff(queue[, Start_Position], na.rm = TRUE),
#       na.rm = TRUE) > avg_mut_dis) {
#       start_idx = start_idx + 1
#       end_idx = end_idx + 1
#       queue = chr.dat[start_idx:end_idx]
#     }
#     else {
#       while (mean(diff(queue[, Start_Position], na.rm = TRUE),
#         na.rm = TRUE) <= avg_mut_dis & end_idx <= nrow(chr.dat)) {
#         end_idx = end_idx + 1
#         queue = chr.dat[start_idx:end_idx]
#       }
#       x = chr.dat[(start_idx):c(end_idx - 1)]
#       ycp = data.table::data.table(Chromosome = unique(as.numeric(as.character(x[,
#         Chromosome]))), Start_Position = x[, min(Start_Position)],
#         End_Position = x[, max(Start_Position)], nMuts = nrow(x),
#         Avg_intermutation_dist = mean(x[, diff(Start_Position)]))
#       ycp[, `:=`(Size, End_Position - Start_Position)]
#       ycp = cbind(ycp, data.table::dcast(data = x[, .N,
#         .(con.class, Tumor_Sample_Barcode)], Tumor_Sample_Barcode ~
#         con.class, value.var = "N"))
#       kat_loc = data.table::rbindlist(l = list(kat_loc,
#         ycp), fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)
#       start_idx = end_idx
#       end_idx = end_idx + num_of_mut
#       queue = chr.dat[(start_idx):(end_idx)]
#     }
#   }
#   kat_loc
# }
# 
# environment(rainfallPlot) <- asNamespace('maftools')
# environment(detect_kataegis_chr) <- asNamespace('maftools')
# assignInNamespace("detect_kataegis_chr", detect_kataegis_chr, ns = "maftools")

```


```{r}

#mutation_dens(crc_eve_p18, mut_window = 3, average_distance = 1000)
HMR_18 <- mutation_dens(crc_hs_p18, mut_window = 3, average_distance = 20000, merge_overlapped_windows = T)

mutation_dens(crc_hs_p18_hp1, mut_window = 3, average_distance = 20000)
mutation_dens(crc_hs_p18_hp2, mut_window = 3, average_distance = 20000)

#mutation_dens(crc_eve_p19, mut_window = 3, average_distance = 1000)
HMR_19 <- mutation_dens(crc_hs_p19, mut_window = 3, average_distance = 20000, merge_overlapped_windows = T)
mutation_dens(crc_hs_p19_hp1, mut_window = 3, average_distance = 20000)
mutation_dens(crc_hs_p19_hp2, mut_window = 3, average_distance = 20000)

write.csv(HMR_18, file = "HMRs_18.csv", quote = F)
write.csv(HMR_19, file = "HMRs_19.csv", quote = F)
```



########################
##   Load no IGR      ##
########################

```{r}

crc_noigr   = read.maf(maf = input_maf, vc_nonSyn = noigr)


crc_noigr_p18 <- filterMaf(crc_noigr, tsb = "tumor_19" ) #opposite
crc_noigr_p19 <- filterMaf(crc_noigr, tsb = "tumor_18")

crc_noigr_hs_p18 <- subsetMaf(crc_noigr_p18, query = "HPST>=30")
crc_noigr_hs_p19 <- subsetMaf(crc_noigr_p19, query = "HPST>=30")


```


########################
##   General Plots    ##
########################

```{r, echo=False}
#set colors per gene loci
col = c(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12,name = "Paired"),
        RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(11,name = "Spectral")[1:3],'black', 'violet', 'royalblue', '#7b7060')
col = grDevices::adjustcolor(col = col, alpha.f = 0.5)
names(col) = names(getSampleSummary(crc_noigr))
col = col[1:(length(col) - 4)]

#mafbarplot(maf = crc, n = 20, color = col)

plotmafSummary(maf = crc_noigr , rmOutlier = TRUE, addStat = 'median', dashboard = TRUE, titvRaw = FALSE, color = col,showBarcodes = T)

```



########################
## Haplotypes filter ##
########################

```{r}
#check filter per sample
crc_18 <- filterMaf(crc_noigr, tsb = "tumor_19") #opposite
crc_19 <- filterMaf(crc_noigr, tsb = "tumor_18")

plot(y = 1:length(sort(crc_noigr_p18@data$HPST)), x= sort(crc_noigr_p18@data$HPST), main = "Gene associated SMs filtration P18", 
     ylab="Somatic Mutations", xlab = "Phred-scaled p-value in tumor (HPST)",  pch = 16 )
abline(v = 30, col = "red")
text(45, 1500, "HPST >= 30")
grid(col = "lightgray")
```


```{r}
plot(y = 1:length(sort(crc_noigr_p19@data$HPST)), x= sort(crc_noigr_p19@data$HPST), main = "Gene associated SMs filtration P19", 
     ylab="Somatic Mutations", xlab = "Phred-scaled p-value in tumor (HPST)",  pch = 16 )
abline(v = 30, col = "red")
text(52, 2000, "HPST >= 30")
grid(col = "lightgray")


```

#########################################
###    Split samples high scores      ###
#########################################

```{r}

mut_18_hs <- crc_noigr_hs_p18 #opposite
mut_19_hs <- crc_noigr_hs_p19


#test one gene
gene_symbol = "APC"
mut_18_hs@data[mut_18_hs@data$Hugo_Symbol==gene_symbol,][,c("Start_Position", "Variant_Classification",
                                                "t_depth","t_HPR", "t_HPA", "n_depth","n_HPR", "n_HPA", "HPST")]
mut_19_hs@data[mut_19_hs@data$Hugo_Symbol==gene_symbol,][,c("Start_Position", "Variant_Classification",
                                                "t_depth","t_HPR", "t_HPA", "n_depth","n_HPR", "n_HPA", "HPST")]

maftools::lollipopPlot(mut_19_hs, gene = "APC",  AACol = 'HGVSp_Short')

```

#############################
###  dups_genes analysis ###
#############################

```{r}
keep_only_dups <- function (maf_file) {
  genes_list <- sort(maf_file@data$Hugo_Symbol)
  dups_genes <- genes_list[duplicated(x = genes_list)]
  dups_genes <- unique(dups_genes)
  #filter
  only_dups_maf  <- subsetMaf(maf_file, genes = dups_genes)
  return(only_dups_maf)
  }

mut_18_hs_dups <- keep_only_dups(mut_18_hs)
mut_19_hs_dups <- keep_only_dups(mut_19_hs)

#good stats
mut_18_hs_dups@variant.type.summary
mut_18_hs_dups@variant.classification.summary
length(unique(mut_18_hs_dups@data$Hugo_Symbol))

mut_19_hs_dups@variant.type.summary
mut_19_hs_dups@variant.classification.summary
length(unique(mut_19_hs_dups@data$Hugo_Symbol))


```

# genes that are duplicated 
```{r}
mafbarplot(mut_18_hs_dups, color = col, n = 20)
mafbarplot(mut_19_hs_dups, color = col, n = 20)
```

###########################
# Intersect with Database #
###########################
```{r}
#lates version Cosmic V98
cosmic <- read.csv("../../Cosmic_CancerGeneCensus_v98_GRCh38.tsv", sep = "\t",header = T) 
cosmic$ENSgene <- sub(".*(ENSG.\\d*).*" , "\\1", cosmic$SYNONYMS) 

#colon <- read.csv("../Census_allTue_Aug_16_15_10_52_2022.tsv", sep = "\t",header = T) 

intersect_with_ref <- function (cancerref, maf_file) {
  sub <- cancerref[cancerref$GENE_SYMBOL %in% maf_file@data$Hugo_Symbol,] #Gene.Symbol in old db
  rownames(sub) <- 1:nrow(sub)
  return(sub)
  # pcg = dups_genes_mut[dups_genes_mut$BIOTYPE == "protein_coding"]
  # colon$Gene[colon$Gene.Symbol %in% pcg$Hugo_Symbol] 
}


intersect_with_ref_ensgene<- function (cancerref, maf_file) {
#todo
  sub <- cancerref[cancerref$ENSgene %in% maf_file@data$Gene,] #ENSgene
  rownames(sub) <- 1:nrow(sub)
  return(sub)
  # pcg = dups_genes_m
}


colonref_in_18_dups <- intersect_with_ref(mut_18_hs_dups, cancerref = cosmic)
colonref_in_19_dups <- intersect_with_ref(mut_19_hs_dups, cancerref = cosmic)


mut_18_dups_in_colonref <- subsetMaf(mut_18_hs_dups, genes = colonref_in_18_dups$GENE_SYMBOL)

mut_19_dups_in_colonref <- subsetMaf(mut_19_hs_dups, genes = colonref_in_19_dups$GENE_SYMBOL)

head(mut_18_dups_in_colonref@gene.summary)
head(mut_19_dups_in_colonref@gene.summary)


par(mfrow=c(1,2))
mafbarplot(mut_18_dups_in_colonref, color = col, n=30, showPct = F)
mafbarplot(mut_19_dups_in_colonref, color = col, n=30, showPct = F)

##shared 18_19 with database
#genes_dups_in_both_with_db <- genes_dups_in_both[genes_dups_in_both %in% cosmic$GENE_SYMBOL]
#mut_18_dups_shared_with_db <- subsetMaf(mut_18_hs_dups, genes = genes_dups_in_both_with_db)
#mut_19_dups_shared_with_db <- subsetMaf(mut_19_hs_dups, genes = genes_dups_in_both_with_db)
#par(mfrow=c(1,2))
#mafbarplot(mut_18_dups_shared_with_db, color = col, n = 20)
#mafbarplot(mut_19_dups_shared_with_db, color = col, n = 20)
```


```{r}
#plot intersection
p2 <- venn.diagram(
  x = list(mut_18_hs_dups@data$Hugo_Symbol,
           mut_19_hs_dups@data$Hugo_Symbol,
           cosmic$GENE_SYMBOL
           ),
  category.names = c("P18", "P19", "COSMIC"), filename = "H18_H19_Cosmic.png",
  disable.logging = TRUE, main = NULL,
  print.mode = c("raw"), sigdigs = 2, main.cex = 1.1, cat.fontface = "bold",
  height = 800,  width = 800, units = "px",   resolution = 300,  compression = "lzw",
  imagetype = "png",  fill = c(col[1],col[6],col[8]),
  cex = 1, #size numbers
  lty = 'blank', #dotted line
  #Set names
  cat.cex = 1.1, cat.default.pos = "outer"
);

p2


```
![Intersected image with COSMIC](H18_H19_Cosmic.png)


```{r}
mut18_dups_withHP <-  add_HP_to_maf(mut_18_dups_in_colonref)
mut19_dups_withHP <-  add_HP_to_maf(mut_19_dups_in_colonref)

mut18_dups_withHP <- mut18_dups_withHP@data %>%
  dplyr::select(c(SYMBOL, Chromosome, Start_Position, End_Position, HP, Variant_Classification))

mut19_dups_withHP <- mut19_dups_withHP@data %>%
  dplyr::select(c(SYMBOL, Chromosome, Start_Position, End_Position, HP, Variant_Classification))

write.table(mut18_dups_withHP, file = "mut18_dups_withHP.csv", row.names = F)
write.table(mut19_dups_withHP, file = "mut19_dups_withHP.csv", row.names = F)

```

#Selecting the 3 groups from prrevious plot
```{r}
cos_18_19 <- intersect(cosmic$GENE_SYMBOL, 
          intersect(mut_18_hs_dups@data$Hugo_Symbol,
                   (mut_19_hs_dups@data$Hugo_Symbol)))

cos_18 <- intersect(cosmic$GENE_SYMBOL,mut_18_hs_dups@data$Hugo_Symbol)

cos_19 <- intersect(cosmic$GENE_SYMBOL,mut_19_hs_dups@data$Hugo_Symbol)

```


########################
## split haplotypes   ##
## & Plot mutations   ##
########################

```{r}

commas_to_cols <- function(df, wanted_col = "t_HPA") {
  wanted = data.frame(base::do.call(rbind, strsplit(df$t_HPA, ",")))
  wanted = apply(wanted, 2, function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))
  return(wanted)
}

#genes_dups add cov
to_plot_hap_mut <- function(maf_file) {
  if (class(maf_file) == "MAF") {
    maf_file <- data.frame(maf_file@data)
  }
  mut_sample_per_hap <-  rbind(
    cbind(maf_file[,c("Chromosome", "Start_Position", "End_Position",
                           "BIOTYPE", "Variant_Classification", "Hugo_Symbol", "Gene")],
          t_HPA = commas_to_cols(maf_file, "t_HPA")[,1]),
   #note the minus sign before last column
    cbind(maf_file[,c("Chromosome", "Start_Position", "End_Position",
                           "BIOTYPE", "Variant_Classification", "Hugo_Symbol", "Gene")],
          t_HPA = -commas_to_cols(maf_file, "t_HPA")[,2])
  )

  names(mut_sample_per_hap) <- c("chr", "start", "end", "btype", "vclass", "Hugo_Symbol" , "ENSGene", "cov")
  # remove not cov

  mut_sample_per_hap <- mut_sample_per_hap[mut_sample_per_hap$cov!=0,]
  # make it binary
  mut_sample_per_hap[mut_sample_per_hap$cov > 0 ,]$cov = 1
  mut_sample_per_hap[mut_sample_per_hap$cov < 0 ,]$cov = -1
  return(mut_sample_per_hap)
}


#Here not only the dup
mut_18_hs_per_hap <- to_plot_hap_mut(mut_18_hs)
mut_19_hs_per_hap <- to_plot_hap_mut(mut_19_hs) 

#Here are the dup
mut_18_dups_per_hap <- to_plot_hap_mut(mut_18_hs_dups)
mut_19_dups_per_hap <- to_plot_hap_mut(mut_19_hs_dups)  

length(unique(mut_18_dups_per_hap$Hugo_Symbol))
length(unique(mut_19_dups_per_hap$Hugo_Symbol))

length(unique(mut_18_dups_per_hap$Hugo_Symbol))
length(unique(mut_19_dups_per_hap$Hugo_Symbol))

```


#Annotate (we can get the coordinates for plotting)
```{r}
# Load transcript meta data
library(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene)
txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene

# Load BSgenome
library(BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)
genome <- BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38


# Define a region of interest
# will be taken as list from biomaRT
library(biomaRt)

get_genes_gr <- function(genes_list = "", search_col = 1)
{
  if(search_col == 1) {
    search_col = "hgnc_symbol"
  } else {
    search_col = "ensembl_gene_id"
  }
  regions <- getBM(mart= useMart('ensembl', dataset='hsapiens_gene_ensembl',
                                 host="https://useast.ensembl.org/"),
                   attributes=c('hgnc_symbol', 'chromosome_name',
                                'start_position', 'end_position', 'strand', "ensembl_gene_id"),
                   filters=search_col, values=genes_list)
  
  regions <- regions[regions$chromosome_name %in% c(seq(1,22),"X","Y"),]
  regions$chromosome_name <- paste0("chr",regions$chromosome_name)
  regions$strand[regions$strand ==  1] = "+"
  regions$strand[regions$strand == -1] = "-"
  
  
  gr <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(df = regions, seqnames.field = "chromosome_name",
                                 start.field = "start_position",
                                 end.field = "end_position",
                                 strand.field = "strand",
                                 keep.extra.columns = TRUE
  )
  return(gr)
}

```

#plotting
```{r}
# choose a gene from the following
# cos_18
# cos_19
# cos_18_19

# select the sample
# mut_18_dups_per_hap
# mut_19_dups_per_hap

# Define the data as a list

genCov_1 <- function(list_to_plot = mut_18_dups_per_hap,
                         wanted_gene = "",
                         sample_lable = "sample") {
  #check if the selected gene is mutated
  if (!(wanted_gene %in% list_to_plot$Hugo_Symbol)) {
    stop("SELECTED GENE IS NOT MUTATED")
  }
  
  ll <- list(list_to_plot)
  names(ll) <- sample_lable
  genCov(x = ll,                                            #list of mutations to plot with 1 and -1 for
       gr = get_genes_gr(wanted_gene),
       gene_name = wanted_gene,
       txdb = txdb, genome = genome, gene_labelTranscript = FALSE,
       gene_colour = "darkgray")
}


```

###############################
## Haplotypes Plotting colored
###############################

```{r}

library(GenVisR)

#Adjusted 2 functions from GenVisR
mygenCov <- function (x, txdb, gr, genome, reduce = FALSE, gene_colour = NULL, 
                      gene_name = "Gene", gene_plotLayer = NULL, label_bgFill = "black", #"lightyellow", 
                      label_txtFill = "white", label_borderFill = "black", label_txtSize = 10, 
                      lab2plot_ratio = c(1, 10), cov_colour = "blue", cov_plotType = "point", 
                      cov_plotLayer = NULL, base = c(10, 2, 2), transform = c("Intron", 
                                                                              "CDS", "UTR"),
                      gene_labelTranscript = TRUE, gene_labelTranscriptSize = 4, 
                      gene_isoformSel = NULL, out = "plot", subsample = FALSE) 
{
  data <- GenVisR:::genCov_qual(x = x, txdb = txdb, gr = gr, genome = genome)
  x <- data$x
  txdb <- data$txdb
  gr <- data$gr
  genome <- data$genome
  gp_result <- GenVisR:::geneViz(txdb, gr, genome, reduce = reduce, gene_colour = gene_colour, 
                                 base = base, transform = transform, isoformSel = gene_isoformSel, 
                                 labelTranscriptSize = gene_labelTranscriptSize, labelTranscript = gene_labelTranscript, 
                                 plotLayer = gene_plotLayer)
  gene <- gp_result$plot 
  #only gene without cov
  #return(gene)
  gene_list <- list()
  gene_list[[gene_name]] <- gene
  test2 <- function(x, min, max) {
    idx <- -which(x$end <= min | x$end >= max)
    if (length(idx)) {
      x <- x[idx, ]
    }
    return(x)
  }
  coverage_data <- lapply(x, test2, start(gr), end(gr))
  xlimits <- c(start(gr), end(gr))
  display_x_axis <- TRUE
  if (!is.null(transform) && length(transform) > 0) {
    master <- gp_result$master
    test <- function(x) {
      x$start <- x$end
      return(x)
    }
    coverage_data <- lapply(coverage_data, test)
    message("Mapping coverage data onto transformed gene-space")
    coverage_data <- lapply(coverage_data, geneViz_mapCovCoordSpace, 
                            master = master)
    for (i in 1:length(coverage_data)) {
      coverage_data[[i]] <- coverage_data[[i]][, c("trans_start", 
                                                   "trans_end", "cov")]
      colnames(coverage_data[[i]]) <- c("start", "end", 
                                        "cov")
    }
    start <- cbind(GenomicRanges::start(gr), GenomicRanges::start(gr))
    end <- cbind(GenomicRanges::end(gr), GenomicRanges::end(gr))
    temp <- as.data.frame(rbind(start, end))
    colnames(temp) <- c("start", "end")
    temp <- plyr::adply(temp, 1, geneViz_mapCoordSpace, master = master)
    xlimits <- c(min(temp$trans_start), max(temp$trans_end))
    display_x_axis <- FALSE
  }
  if (subsample) {
    transform.coordinates <- function(master_row, x, tx.graph.width) {
      lt <- x$start <= master_row$trans_end
      gt <- x$end >= master_row$trans_start
      idx = which(lt & gt)
      x.sub <- x[idx, ]
      width <- dim(x.sub)[1]
      adjusted.width <- round(1000 * (master_row$width/tx.graph.width))
      if (width > adjusted.width) {
        s <- seq.int(from = 1, to = width, length.out = adjusted.width)
        x.sub <- x.sub[s, ]
      }
      return(x.sub)
    }
    perform_subsample <- function(x, master) {
      tx.graph.width <- sum(master$width)
      y <- plyr::adply(master, 1, transform.coordinates, 
                       x = x, tx.graph.width = tx.graph.width)
      y
    }
    coverage_data <- lapply(coverage_data, perform_subsample, 
                            master = master)
  }
  coverage_plot <- lapply(coverage_data, mygenCov_buildCov, colour = cov_colour, 
                          plot_type = cov_plotType, x_limits = xlimits, display_x_axis = display_x_axis, 
                          layers = cov_plotLayer)
  
  merged_data <- c(gene_list, coverage_plot)
  track_coverage_plot <- GenVisR:::genCov_trackViz(merged_data, gene_name = gene_name, 
                                                   bgFill = label_bgFill, textFill = label_txtFill, border = label_borderFill, 
                                                   size = label_txtSize, axis_align = "width", widthRatio = lab2plot_ratio, 
                                                   list = TRUE)
  output <- GenVisR:::multi_selectOut(data = merged_data, plot = track_coverage_plot, 
                                      draw = TRUE, out = out)
  return(output)
}


mygenCov_buildCov <- function(data_frame, x_limits=NULL, display_x_axis=TRUE,
                              colour="blue", plot_type="point", layers=NULL, color_keys = col)
{
  # Specify various parameters of the plot
  line <- geom_line(colour=colour)
  bar <- geom_bar(fill=colour, width=1, stat="identity")
  
  # Map the colors
  #way0: single color, from original function
  # point <- geom_point(fill=colour, colour=colour) 
  
  #way1: extract translate the name to color in the keys
  # col_by_type <- plyr::mapvalues(data_frame$vclass, from = names(color_keys), to = c(matrix(color_keys)) )
  # point <- geom_point(fill=col_by_type, colour=col_by_type) 
  
  #way2: map the factor in the sample, note that you add the
  #      key color scale_colour_manual to the plot
  point <- geom_point(aes(colour = factor(data_frame$vclass))) 
  
  if(is.null(x_limits))
  {
    x_limits <- xlim(c(min(data_frame$end), max(data_frame$end)))
  } else {
    x_limits <- xlim(x_limits)
  }
  
  if(!is.null(layers))
  {
    layers <- layers
  } else {
    layers <- geom_blank()
  }
  
  # Define the theme
  if(display_x_axis == TRUE)
  {
    theme <- theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
                   legend.position = "none", #"bottom",
                   #legend.direction = "horizontal",
                   legend.title = element_text(size = 5),
                   legend.text = element_text(size = 5)
    )
  } else {
    theme <- theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
                   axis.text.x=element_blank(),
                   axis.ticks.x=element_blank(),
                   legend.position = "none", #"bottom",
                   #legend.direction = "horizontal",
                   legend.title = element_text(size = 5),
                   legend.text = element_text(size = 5)
    )
  }
  
  
  # Define y label
  y_label <- ylab("Haplotype")
  
  # Define the main plot
  cov_plot <- ggplot(data_frame, aes_string(x='end', y='cov')) + x_limits +
    theme_bw() + theme + y_label + layers  + scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(1,-1)) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = color_keys) +
    labs(color='MUTATION GROUP') 
  
  # Define Control structure for plot type
  if(toupper(plot_type) == "LINE")
  {
    cov_plot <- cov_plot + line
  } else if(toupper(plot_type) == "BAR"){
    cov_plot <- cov_plot + bar
  } else if(toupper(plot_type) == "POINT") {
    cov_plot <- cov_plot + point
  } else {
    memo <- paste0("Do not recoginze: ", plot_type,
                   ", please specify 'line', 'point' or 'bar'")
    stop(memo)
  }
  
  return(cov_plot)
}

```



```{r, echo=NULL}
#plotting

#gr <- get_genes_gr(genes_dups_in_both)

#fulll gr
genes_dups_in_any <- unique(c(mut_18_hs_dups@data$Hugo_Symbol, mut_19_hs_dups@data$Hugo_Symbol))
gr <- get_genes_gr(genes_dups_in_any)
grA <- get_genes_gr("APC")

#genCov_1(mut_18_dups_per_hap, "APC", "P18")
#genCov_1(mut_19_dups_per_hap, "APC", "P19")

```

#Make the pdf plot
```{r, fig.width = 8, fig.height=4}
# Create Data for input
cov_input_A <- mut_18_dups_per_hap
cov_input_B <- mut_19_dups_per_hap

# Define the data as a list
data <- list(`P18` = cov_input_A, `P19` = cov_input_B)

pdf("APC_full.pdf", width = 8, height = 3)

mygenCov(data[2], txdb, grA , genome, transform = NULL, base = NULL,
       gene_labelTranscript = T, gene_name = "APC",
       gene_colour = "black",label_bgFill = "#b4c6e8ff", label_txtFill = "black", out = "plot",
       gene_labelTranscriptSize = 0.5)
dev.off()

#subsetByOverlaps(exons(txdb), gene_to_plot)


```

#Plotting with zoom

```{r, fig.width = 8, fig.height=3}
WANTED_GENE = "APC" 
gene_to_plot = grA[grA$hgnc_symbol==WANTED_GENE]
# The two mutations position in P19 are: 112837805, 112839942
# To zoom to the mutations, add the following line:
gene_to_plot@ranges = IRanges(start = 112837000, width = 4000)
pdf("APC_mutations.pdf", width = 8, height = 3)

mygenCov(data[2], txdb, gene_to_plot , genome, transform = NULL, base = NULL,
         gene_labelTranscript = FALSE, gene_name = gene_to_plot$hgnc_symbol,
         gene_colour = "black",label_bgFill = "#b4c6e8ff", label_txtFill = "black" )
dev.off()
```


```{r}
####################
### plot legends ###
####################

plot(NULL ,xaxt='n',yaxt='n',bty='n',ylab='',xlab='', xlim=0:1, ylim=0:1)
legend("topleft", legend =names(col), pch=16, pt.cex=1, cex=1, bty='n',
       col = col)
mtext("Groups", at=0.2, cex=1)
p1 <- recordPlot()
plot.new()

```

#####################################################
### plot GENES with their mutations in HP context ###
#####################################################

```{r, fig.width = 8, fig.height=4}

#Adjusted function to plot genes with their mutations in HP context

filter_to_region <- function(mylist, region){
  filtered_18 <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(mylist[[1]],keep.extra.columns = T,seqnames.field = "chr", start.field = "start", end.field = "end")
  filtered_19 <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(mylist[[2]],keep.extra.columns = T,seqnames.field = "chr", start.field = "start", end.field = "end")
  
  filtered_18 <- data.frame ( subsetByOverlaps(filtered_18, region) )
  filtered_19 <- data.frame ( subsetByOverlaps(filtered_19, region) )
  
  filtered <- list(`P18`=filtered_18 ,`P19`=filtered_19) 
  return(filtered)
}

#genes_dups_in_both_with_db
plot_gene <- function (WANTED_GENE = "LRP1B", loc=NULL) {
  gene_to_plot = gr[gr$hgnc_symbol==WANTED_GENE]
  
  new_data <- filter_to_region (data, gene_to_plot)
  
  print(new_data)
  #keep only wanted chr
   if (!is.null(loc)) {
    start = as.numeric(strsplit(loc,"-")[[1]][1])
    end = as.numeric(strsplit(loc,"-")[[1]][2]) - start 
    
    gene_to_plot@ranges = IRanges(start = start, width = end)
    mygenCov(new_data, txdb, gene_to_plot , genome, transform = NULL, base = NULL,
         gene_labelTranscript = FALSE, gene_name = gene_to_plot$hgnc_symbol,
         gene_colour = "black",label_bgFill = "#b4c6e8ff", label_txtFill = "black" )
    
  } else {
      mygenCov(new_data, txdb, gene_to_plot , genome, transform = NULL, base = NULL,
      gene_labelTranscript = FALSE, gene_name = gene_to_plot$hgnc_symbol,
      gene_colour = "black",label_bgFill = "#b4c6e8ff", label_txtFill = "black",label_txtSize = 5)
  }

}

plot_gene("CNTNAP2")
# plot_gene("PTPRD")
#plot_gene("ERBB4", loc = "211740000-211760000")
```


###########################
# Count SMs per haplotype #
###########################

#This will be needed in the next section

```{r}
# Assign double or single tags
count_mut_per_gene <- function (mut_list) {
  #https://stackoverflow.com/questions/70442161/
  #how many mutations
  mut_count_all <- mut_list %>% count(Hugo_Symbol, ENSGene, name="all_gene_mut")
  #mutaions per allele
  mut_count_hp  <- mut_list %>% count(Hugo_Symbol, cov, name="per_hp")
  #make single matrix
  mut_per_gene <- merge(mut_count_hp, mut_count_all, by="Hugo_Symbol")
  
  mut_per_gene <- mut_per_gene[order(mut_per_gene$all_gene_mut,decreasing = T),]
  
  mut_per_gene$type <- "double"
  mut_per_gene$type[mut_per_gene$all_gene_mut == mut_per_gene$per_hp]  <- "single"
  
  return(mut_per_gene)
}


count_mut_18 <- count_mut_per_gene(mut_18_dups_per_hap)
count_mut_19 <- count_mut_per_gene(mut_19_dups_per_hap)
length(unique(count_mut_18$Hugo_Symbol))
length(unique(count_mut_19$Hugo_Symbol))

#counts for double
dim(unique(count_mut_18 %>% filter(type=="single") %>% dplyr::select(Hugo_Symbol)))
dim(unique(count_mut_19 %>% filter(type=="single") %>% dplyr::select(Hugo_Symbol)))


#add granges annotations
add_ranges_of_genes <- function (count_granges) {
  count_granges_loci <- data.frame( get_genes_gr(count_granges$ENSGene, search_col = 2 ) ) 

  colnames(count_granges_loci)[6:7] = c("hgnc_symbol","ENSGene")

  labeled <- merge(count_granges, count_granges_loci, by="ENSGene", all=T)

  labeled <- labeled[order(labeled$all_gene_mut,decreasing = T),]
}

count_mut_18_with_loci <- add_ranges_of_genes(count_mut_18)
count_mut_19_with_loci <- add_ranges_of_genes(count_mut_19)
length(unique(count_mut_18_with_loci$Hugo_Symbol))
length(unique(count_mut_19_with_loci$Hugo_Symbol))

#counts for double afterlable
dim(unique(count_mut_18_with_loci %>% filter(type=="single") %>% dplyr::select(Hugo_Symbol)))
dim(unique(count_mut_19_with_loci %>% filter(type=="single") %>% dplyr::select(Hugo_Symbol)))


write.table(count_mut_18_with_loci, file = "count_mut_18_labeled.csv", sep = "\t", quote = F, col.names = T, row.names = F)
write.table(count_mut_19_with_loci, file = "count_mut_19_labeled.csv", sep = "\t", quote = F, col.names = T, row.names = F)


```


```{r}
count_mut_18_with_loci_s <- count_mut_18_with_loci %>% filter(type=="single")  
count_mut_19_with_loci_s <- count_mut_19_with_loci %>% filter(type=="single") 

intersect(count_mut_18_with_loci_s$Hugo_Symbol, count_mut_19_with_loci_s$Hugo_Symbol)
```




##############################################################
### Plot whole Chromosome with mutated genes in 1 or 2 HPS ###
##############################################################

```{r}
# plot Copy numbers per chromosome, and color the gene if it has single or multiple mutations

library(karyoploteR)
library(CopyNumberPlots)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyr)

read_cna <- function(cnapath) {
  cna <- read.table(cnapath, header = T, quote = "\t")
  #cna <- na.omit(cna)
  cna <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(df = cna,
                                  seqnames.field = "chr",
                                  start.field = "Position",
                                  end.field = "Position",
                                  keep.extra.columns = T)
  return(cna)
}

cna_p18 <- read_cna ("/PATH/TO/P18/results/titan/titanCNA_ploidy3/tumor_sample_1_cluster2.titan.txt")
cna_p18 <- cna_p18[,c("Corrected_Ratio", "PhaseSet", "LogRatio", "Corrected_logR", "Corrected_Copy_Number")]

#cna_p19 <- read_cna ("/PATH/TO/P19/results/titan/titanCNA_ploidy3/tumor_sample_1_cluster2.titan.txt")
#cna_p19 <- cna_p19[,c("Corrected_Ratio", "PhaseSet", "LogRatio", "Corrected_logR", "Corrected_Copy_Number")]

```


```{r}
#csv files are generated from a previous step.
muts_18 <- read.table("/PATH/TO/count_mut_18_labeled.csv", sep = "\t", header = T)
# muts_19 <- read.table("/PATH/TO/count_mut_19_labeled.csv", sep = "\t", header = T)

#remove HP related cols
muts_18 <- muts_18[!(colnames(muts_18) %in% c("cov", "per_hp","hgnc_symbol"))]

#check
#muts_18 %>% filter(seqnames == "chr8") %>% arrange(start)

muts_18 <- muts_18 %>% filter(all_gene_mut>=2) %>% dplyr::distinct(Hugo_Symbol, .keep_all = T)
  
muts_18 <- muts_18[!is.na(muts_18$end),]

muts_18 <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(muts_18, keep.extra.columns = T, start.field = "start",
                         end.field = "end", seqnames.field = "seqnames")
loc = "chr8"
  if (grepl("-", loc[1], fixed = T)) {
    loc <- toGRanges(loc)
    kp  <- plotKaryotype(genome = "hg38", zoom =loc, plot.type = 3)
  } else {
    kp  <- plotKaryotype(genome = "hg38", chromosomes=loc, plot.type = 3)
  }

plotLRR(kp, cna_p18 , out.of.range = "points", lrr.column = "LogRatio", points.cex = 0.4,
          ymax = 4, ymin= -4,  points.col = "lightblue", labels = NA)

muts_18$color <- NA
muts_18[muts_18$type=="single"]$color <- "red"
muts_18[muts_18$type=="double"]$color <- "darkgreen"


kpPlotMarkers(kp, data=muts_18, label.color = muts_18$color,
                labels = muts_18$Hugo_Symbol, label.margin=0.5, data.panel = 2)
 
```
